commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh They shall therefore keep my ordinance, lest they bear sin for it, and die therefore, if they profane it: I the LORD do sanctify them. In the sanctuary, is not found in Hebrew which is difficult to explain. "They shall observe my precepts, (or "watches "entering upon the ministry at 17; Josephus; Menochius) and not bear sin for it, and die in it, because they have profaned it "which it, may be understood either of the consecrated food, (ver. 7,) or of the sanctuary.
